'''Galey''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] support staffer in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==Biography==
Galey had shaggy red hair and usually wore a puzzled expression. He was powerfully built, but had short legs which made him average in height. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], he served on the cafeteria staff on ''[[Mon Remonda]]''. His duties included programming menus and providing refreshments for officer's meetings. He believed his job was important, but wasn't satisfied with his salary.

While Galey was on leave on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], agents of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] offered him a substantial amount of money to assassinate several [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] officers with the assistance of several sleeper agents programmed under [[Project Funeral]]. Galey agreed, and began to train himself on [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] simulators so he could escape after carrying out his task.

Just before the [[Battle of Jussafet Four]], Galey activated [[Tal'dira]], a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] member of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], and [[Nuro Tualin]], a Twi'lek in [[Polearm Squadron]]. He then set out to kill [[Edda Gast]]. Galey killed the two officers guarding Gast, and then attacked [[Nawara Ven]], the officer who was negotiating with Gast, by throwing hot [[Caf/Legends|caf]] in his face and punching him in the jaw. Galey fired his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] at Doctor Gast, and then tried to escape.

Ven pursued Galey, shooting his ankle with a snap shot. Galey turned to fire back, and Ven was forced to kill him in self-defense.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
